- "loop": animation will loop instead of stopping

syntax_13979.creator: DRAGNIL68
syntax_13979.title: Active-Model-Node
syntax_13979.description:
there are 2 types of nodes in animated-skript 1 a display-node thats just a item/block display then there is the data node (this type),
the data node just has some info like uuid, transform etc.

each display-node will have a data-node with the same uuid and info

en:
there are 2 types of nodes in animated-skript 1 a display-node thats just a item/block display then there is the data node (this type),
the data node just has some info like uuid, transform etc.

each display-node will have a data-node with the same uuid and info
